def solve(s)
    # Precompute the counts of 'L', 'C', 'T' in the string
    count = Hash.new(0)
    s.each_char { |c| count[c] += 1 }

    # Precompute the number of 'L's before each position
    L_before = Array.new(s.length + 1, 0)
    s.each_with_index do |c, i|
        L_before[i + 1] = L_before[i] + (c == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    # Precompute the number of 'C's before each position
    C_before = Array.new(s.length + 1, 0)
    s.each_with_index do |c, i|
        C_before[i + 1] = C_before[i] + (c == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    # Precompute the number of 'T's after each position
    T_after = Array.new(s.length + 1, 0)
    (s.length - 1).downto(0) do |i|
        T_after[i] = T_after[i + 1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    max_count = 0

    # Try inserting 'L' at each position
    (s.length + 1).times do |i|
        l_count = L_before[i] + 1
        c_count = C_before[i]
        t_count = T_after[i]
        max_count = [max_count, l_count * c_count * t_count].max
    end

    # Try inserting 'C' at each position
    (s.length + 1).times do |i|
        l_count = L_before[i]
        c_count = C_before[i] + 1
        t_count = T_after[i]
        max_count = [max_count, l_count * c_count * t_count].max
    end

    # Try inserting 'T' at each position
    (s.length + 1).times do |i|
        l_count = L_before[i]
        c_count = C_before[i]
        t_count = T_after[i] + 1
        max_count = [max_count, l_count * c_count * t_count].max
    end

    max_count
end
